goa.name: Goa
goa.description: India's beach paradise, famous for its scenic coastline, Portuguese heritage, vibrant nightlife, and water sports.

attractions.name: Baga Beach
attractions.desc: Popular beach known for its water sports, shacks, and vibrant nightlife.

attractions.name: Basilica of Bom Jesus
attractions.desc: UNESCO World Heritage site containing the mortal remains of St. Francis Xavier.

attractions.name: Dudhsagar Falls
attractions.desc: A four-tiered majestic waterfall on the Mandovi River, looking like a sea of milk.

hidden_gems.name: Cola Beach
hidden_gems.desc: A stunning, secluded beach featuring a unique freshwater lagoon merging with the sea.

hidden_gems.name: Chorao Island
hidden_gems.desc: Quiet river island hosting the Salim Ali Bird Sanctuary, accessible by ferry.

famous_foods.name: Fish Curry Rice
famous_foods.desc: Spicy, tangy coconut-based fish curry served with warm red rice.

famous_foods.name: Bebinca
famous_foods.desc: A rich, traditional multi-layered Indo-Portuguese pudding made from coconut milk and ghee.

vehicle_rentals.name: Activa / Jupiter
vehicle_rentals.best_for: Beaches and narrow coastal streets. Highly recommended for Goa!

vehicle_rentals.name: Royal Enfield Classic 350
vehicle_rentals.best_for: Scenic coastal cruising and highway travel.

vehicle_rentals.name: Maruti Swift
vehicle_rentals.best_for: Family travel and monsoon weather protection.

vehicle_rentals.name: Mahindra Thar (Open Top)
vehicle_rentals.best_for: Off-beat terrains and ultimate premium holiday vibes.

ladakh.name: Ladakh
ladakh.description: The Land of High Passes, featuring majestic cold desert landscapes, deep blue high-altitude lakes, and Tibetan Buddhist culture.

attractions.name: Pangong Tso Lake
attractions.desc: An endorheic high-altitude lake famed for changing shades of blue throughout the day.

attractions.name: Magnetic Hill
attractions.desc: A gravity-defying hill where vehicles appear to roll uphill naturally.

attractions.name: Diskit Monastery
attractions.desc: Largest Buddhist monastery in Nubra Valley, featuring a giant 32-meter Buddha statue.

hidden_gems.name: Turtuk Village
hidden_gems.desc: The last village on the Indian border, rich in apricot trees and Balti culture.

hidden_gems.name: Basgo Monastery
hidden_gems.desc: Spectacular mud-brick monastery ruins perched precariously on clay cliffs.

famous_foods.name: Thukpa & Momos
famous_foods.desc: Hearty Tibetan noodle soup packed with spices, paired with steamed wheat dumplings.

famous_foods.name: Butter Tea (Gur Gur Cha)
famous_foods.desc: Traditional Himalayan tea churned with yak butter, salt, and tea leaves to prevent chapped lips.

vehicle_rentals.name: KTM Adventure 390
vehicle_rentals.best_for: Steep rocky mountain passes and high-altitude highway touring.

vehicle_rentals.name: Royal Enfield Himalayan 450
vehicle_rentals.best_for: Unmatched suspension and power on Ladakh gravel streams. Strongly recommended!

vehicle_rentals.name: Toyota Innova / Scorpio (4x4)
vehicle_rentals.best_for: Group travel across deep water crossings and unpaved roads.

rajasthan.name: Rajasthan
rajasthan.description: The Land of Kings, showcasing majestic forts, royal palaces, shimmering sand dunes, and vibrant folk traditions.

attractions.name: Amer Fort, Jaipur
attractions.desc: A massive hill fort known for its artistic Hindu-style elements and Sheesh Mahal (mirror hall).

attractions.name: Lake Pichola, Udaipur
attractions.desc: A scenic freshwater lake housing the famous Taj Lake Palace in its center.

attractions.name: Mehrangarh Fort, Jodhpur
attractions.desc: A towering 15th-century fort carved directly out of massive red rocks.

hidden_gems.name: Abhaneri Stepwell (Chand Baori)
hidden_gems.desc: A breathtaking 13-story deep geometrical stepwell dating back over 1000 years.

hidden_gems.name: Bhangarh Fort
hidden_gems.desc: Infamous ruined city known as India's most haunted location; entry forbidden after sunset.

famous_foods.name: Dal Baati Churma
famous_foods.desc: Baked wheat balls served with mixed lentil curry, loaded with pure desi ghee and sweet jaggery crumbs.

famous_foods.name: Laal Maas
famous_foods.desc: A fiery, traditional hot mutton curry cooked in a base of red Mathania chillies and yogurt.

vehicle_rentals.name: Honda Activa
vehicle_rentals.best_for: Easy exploration of busy walled cities like Jaipur or Jodhpur.

vehicle_rentals.name: Maruti Swift
vehicle_rentals.best_for: Navigating highway transits between Jaipur, Ajmer, and Udaipur.

vehicle_rentals.name: Mahindra Scorpio
vehicle_rentals.best_for: Desert highway trips and desert camp access near Jaisalmer.

vehicle_rentals.name: Mercedes C-Class
vehicle_rentals.best_for: Premium luxury tour of palace heritage hotels.

kerala.name: Kerala
kerala.description: God's Own Country, famed for its tranquil backwaters, mist-shrouded tea plantations, spice gardens, and Ayurvedic wellness.

attractions.name: Alleppey Backwaters
attractions.desc: Network of lagoons and canals traversed by luxury traditional houseboats (Kettuvallams).

attractions.name: Munnar Tea Gardens
attractions.desc: Infinite rolling hills carpeted in bright green tea bushes, located in the Western Ghats.

attractions.name: Athirappilly Waterfalls
attractions.desc: India's Niagra Falls - a roaring 80-foot waterfall featured in several epic blockbusters.

hidden_gems.name: Marari Beach
hidden_gems.desc: An pristine, crowd-free white sand beach surrounded by towering coconut groves.

hidden_gems.name: Meenmutty Falls
hidden_gems.desc: A spectacular three-tiered forest waterfall accessed via a scenic trek in Wayanad.

famous_foods.name: Kerala Sadya
famous_foods.desc: A grand, multi-course feast featuring 24+ vegetarian dishes served traditionally on a fresh banana leaf.
famous_foods.best_places: Traditional restaurants in Kochi and Trivandrum

famous_foods.name: Karimeen Pollichathu
famous_foods.desc: Pearl Spot fish marinated in spicy rich masalas, wrapped in a banana leaf, and slow pan-fried.

vehicle_rentals.name: TVS Ntorq
vehicle_rentals.best_for: Leisurely beach-hopping and coastal town exploration.

vehicle_rentals.name: Royal Enfield Classic
vehicle_rentals.best_for: Climbing the winding hairpin curves to Munnar and Wayanad.

vehicle_rentals.name: Hyundai i20
vehicle_rentals.best_for: Comfortable family road trips through heavy monsoon downpours.

kashmir.name: Kashmir
kashmir.best_season: March to August (Spring/Summer), December to February (Snow)
kashmir.description: Heaven on Earth, famous for its snow-capped peaks, crystal-clear lakes, traditional Shikara boats, and vibrant flower valleys.

attractions.name: Dal Lake, Srinagar
attractions.desc: Srinagar's jewel, famous for floating gardens, wooden houseboats, and Shikara rides.

attractions.name: Gulmarg Gondola
attractions.desc: One of the highest cable cars in the world, taking you to pristine snow-covered Apharwat Peak.

attractions.name: Betaab Valley, Pahalgam
attractions.desc: Stunning alpine meadow bordered by dense pine forests and the rushing Lidder River.

hidden_gems.name: Chatpal Valley
hidden_gems.desc: An untouched, ethereal valley with babbling brooks, wooden bridges, and zero cellular networks.

hidden_gems.name: Lolab Valley
hidden_gems.desc: A peaceful fruit-growing orchard valley covered with pristine forest fringes.

famous_foods.name: Kashmiri Wazwan (Rogan Josh)
famous_foods.desc: A multi-course royal banquet, featuring tender mutton slow-cooked in aromatic Kashmiri spices and alkanet flower extract.

famous_foods.name: Kahwa
famous_foods.desc: Exquisite saffron-infused green tea brewed with cinnamon, cardamom, and finished with crushed almonds.
famous_foods.best_places: Local tea stalls, Shikara vendor boats

vehicle_rentals.name: Royal Enfield Bullet 350
vehicle_rentals.best_for: Riding down the National Highway from Jammu to Srinagar.

vehicle_rentals.name: Toyota Innova Crysta
vehicle_rentals.best_for: Safest choice for groups dealing with high altitude curves and snow.

himachal.name: Himachal Pradesh
himachal.best_season: March to June (Summer), October to February (Snow)
himachal.description: The Land of Snows, featuring high mountain valleys, roaring rivers, pine forests, and adventure hubs like Manali and Bir Billing.

attractions.name: Solang Valley, Manali
attractions.desc: Adventure sport playground known for paragliding, zorbing, and beautiful snow pistes.

attractions.name: Hadimba Temple, Manali
attractions.desc: A beautiful 16th-century wooden temple situated inside a dense deodar forest.

attractions.name: Spiti Valley (Kaza)
attractions.desc: A majestic high-altitude cold desert valley hosting ancient clifftop monasteries.

hidden_gems.name: Jibhi
hidden_gems.desc: A quiet, green forest hamlet featuring serene wooden cottages and cascading waterfalls.

hidden_gems.name: Barot Valley
hidden_gems.desc: An uncrowded fishing valley flanked by terraced hills, perfect for trekking.

famous_foods.name: Dham
famous_foods.desc: A traditional festive mid-day meal containing rice, lentils, madra (kidney beans in yogurt), and sweet rice.
famous_foods.best_places: Heritage stalls in Kangra and Chamba

famous_foods.name: Siddu
famous_foods.desc: Yeast-risen steamed wheat bread stuffed with poppy seeds, dry fruits, or dal, eaten hot with melted ghee.
famous_foods.best_places: Local dhabas in Manali and Shimla

vehicle_rentals.name: KTM Duke 390
vehicle_rentals.best_for: Thrilling rides along the hairpin bends of Himalayan highways.

vehicle_rentals.name: Royal Enfield Himalayan
vehicle_rentals.best_for: Unbeaten comfort on broken Spiti roads and rocky landslides. Recommended!

vehicle_rentals.name: Mahindra Thar 4x4
vehicle_rentals.best_for: Tackling river crossings and snowy road patches in winters.

delhi.name: Delhi
delhi.description: India's capital territory - a massive historical metropolis combining Mughal heritage, British-era architecture, and high-tech urbanity.

attractions.name: Qutub Minar
attractions.desc: A soaring 73-meter brick minaret built in 1193 by Qutab-ud-din Aibak.

attractions.name: Red Fort
attractions.desc: A magnificent 17th-century Mughal red sandstone fortress at the heart of Old Delhi.

attractions.name: India Gate
attractions.desc: A grand triumphal arch war memorial dedicated to the soldiers of British Indian Army.

hidden_gems.name: Agrasen ki Baoli
hidden_gems.desc: A deep, haunting ancient stepwell tucked between towering skyscraper business districts.

hidden_gems.name: Sanjay Van
hidden_gems.desc: A massive, dense urban forest reserve populated by jackals, deer, and ancient Sufi shrines.

famous_foods.name: Butter Chicken
famous_foods.desc: Tandoori-spiced chicken chunks cooked in a rich, buttery, velvety tomato and cashew cream gravy.

famous_foods.name: Chole Bhature
famous_foods.desc: Spicy, black chickpeas paired with giant, fluffy fried leavened breads, served with pickles and onions.
famous_foods.best_places: Sita Ram Diwan Chand, local Connaught Place stalls

vehicle_rentals.name: Honda Activa
vehicle_rentals.best_for: Slipping through narrow commercial lanes and bazaar alleys.

vehicle_rentals.name: Maruti Swift
vehicle_rentals.best_for: Comfortable intra-city travel across extensive ring roads.

maharashtra.name: Maharashtra (Mumbai/Pune)
maharashtra.description: A dynamic powerhouse state containing India's financial capital Mumbai, historic hill forts of Shivaji, and the green Western Ghats.

attractions.name: Gateway of India, Mumbai
attractions.desc: An iconic stone arch monument built to commemorate the visit of King George V in 1911.

attractions.name: Marine Drive
attractions.desc: A sweeping C-shaped beach boulevard famous for spectacular sunset views over the Arabian Sea.

attractions.name: Ajanta & Ellora Caves
attractions.desc: Ancient rock-cut temples and caves featuring intricate Buddhist carvings and Hindu monoliths.

hidden_gems.name: Sandhan Valley
hidden_gems.desc: A breathtaking water-carved grand canyon gorge with cliffs rising 300 feet high.

hidden_gems.name: Harihar Fort
hidden_gems.desc: Famous hill fortress accessible via near-vertical rock-cut steps carved out of a sheer peak.

famous_foods.name: Vada Pav
famous_foods.desc: The 'Indian Burger' - a deep-fried spiced potato dumpling served inside a soft bread bun smeared with garlic chutney.
famous_foods.best_places: Kirti College Vada Pav, local street stalls

famous_foods.name: Misal Pav
famous_foods.desc: A fiery sprout curry garnished with crisp gram flour noodles (farsan), raw onions, squeezed lemon, and hot buttered buns.
famous_foods.best_places: Katakirr in Pune, local Mamledar outlets in Thane

vehicle_rentals.name: Activa 6G
vehicle_rentals.best_for: Beating notorious peak-hour traffic in Mumbai or Pune.

vehicle_rentals.name: Hyundai Grand i10
vehicle_rentals.best_for: Weekend drives up the Mumbai-Pune Expressway to Lonavala.

vehicle_rentals.name: Tata Harrier
vehicle_rentals.best_for: Climbing wet Western Ghat hairpin bends during monsoon.

west_bengal.name: West Bengal
west_bengal.description: A culturally rich state stretching from the mighty Himalayas in Darjeeling to the mangrove deltas of Sundarbans.

attractions.name: Victoria Memorial, Kolkata
attractions.desc: A spectacular white marble palace monument built during British rule, surrounded by manicured lawns.

attractions.name: Darjeeling Toy Train
attractions.desc: UNESCO heritage narrow-gauge steam railway winding through stunning tea plantations and misty mountains.

attractions.name: Sundarbans National Park
attractions.desc: The world's largest mangrove forest reserve, home to the elusive Royal Bengal Tiger.

hidden_gems.name: Lepchajagat
hidden_gems.desc: A peaceful mountain hamlet blanketed in thick oak and rhododendron forests, with Kanchenjunga views.

hidden_gems.name: Chandannagar
hidden_gems.desc: A former French colony containing beautiful 18th-century French architecture and riverfront esplanades.

famous_foods.name: Kolkata Biryani
famous_foods.desc: A highly aromatic, subtle basmati rice dish uniquely featuring slow-cooked soft potato and boiled egg.

famous_foods.name: Rosogolla & Sandesh
famous_foods.desc: Spongy, sweet cottage cheese balls dipped in warm light sugar syrup, along with condensed milk sweets.
famous_foods.best_places: K.C. Das, Balaram Mullick & Radharaman Mullick

vehicle_rentals.name: Honda Dio
vehicle_rentals.best_for: Slipping through busy markets in Kolkata.

vehicle_rentals.name: Maruti WagonR
vehicle_rentals.best_for: Affordable city transport.

vehicle_rentals.name: Mahindra Scorpio (4x4)
vehicle_rentals.best_for: Navigating the steep curves up to Darjeeling.

telangana.name: Telangana (Hyderabad)
telangana.description: An IT powerhouse showcasing grand Nizami heritage, medieval forts, and world-famous cuisine.

attractions.name: Charminar
attractions.desc: A historic mosque with four grand minarets, built in 1591 in the center of old Hyderabad bazaar.

attractions.name: Golconda Fort
attractions.desc: A massive medieval fortress known for incredible acoustical systems and diamond mines.

attractions.name: Ramoji Film City
attractions.desc: The world's largest integrated film studio complex, filled with sets, rides, and shows.

hidden_gems.name: Ananthagiri Hills
hidden_gems.desc: A scenic green forest region featuring coffee plantations and ancient temple stepwells.

hidden_gems.name: Qutb Shahi Tombs
hidden_gems.desc: A peaceful complex of grand domed tombs blending Persian and Hindu architecture.

famous_foods.name: Hyderabadi Biryani
famous_foods.desc: World-famous dish made of layers of basmati rice, tender spiced meat, saffron, and mint, slow-cooked in a sealed clay pot (Dum style).
famous_foods.best_places: Paradise Biryani, Bawarchi, Jewel of Nizam

famous_foods.name: Irani Chai & Osmania Biscuits
famous_foods.desc: A velvety thick, creamy tea brewed in copper urns, paired with sweet-salty butter biscuits.

vehicle_rentals.name: Activa 6G
vehicle_rentals.best_for: Slipping through city traffic.

vehicle_rentals.name: Renault Triber
vehicle_rentals.best_for: Economical city exploration.
